candidate_definitions.text: A frontend Framework for single-page applications on top of REST/GraphQL APIs, using TypeScript, React and Material Design

A frontend Framework for building single-page applications running in the browser on top of REST/GraphQL APIs, using TypeScript, [React](https://facebook.github.io/react/) and [Material Design](https://material.io/). Open sourced and maintained by [marmelab](https://marmelab.com…

candidate_glosses.text: A frontend Framework for building single-page applications running in the browser on top of REST/GraphQL APIs, using TypeScript, [React](https://facebook.github.io/react/) and [Material Design](https://material.io/). Open sourced and maintained by [marmelab](https://marmelab.com…
